case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION
